{{Infobox religious building| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | name = Todoroki Shrine | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] |image = {{image requested|cat=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} | location = {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}} {{ill|Kaifu District, Tokushima|en|Kaifu District, Tokushima|WD=Q1155923|lt=Kaifu District, Tokushima|1=Kaifu District, Tokushima}} {{ill|Kaiyō, Tokushima|en|Kaiyō, Tokushima|WD=Q1205954|lt=Kaiyō|1=Kaiyō, Tokushima}} Hirai Ōyo-godani 21-1 | coordinates = {{Coord|33.698405|N|134.254483|E|region:JP_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} | Deities = {{ill|Mizuhanome|en|Mizuhanome|WD=Q8191796|lt=Mizuhanome|1=Mizuhanome}}
{{ill|Kunisatsuchi|ja|国狭槌尊|1=Kunisatsuchi-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunisatsuchi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunisatsuchi-no-Mikoto|qq=}}
{{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}} | Rank = | consecration_year = During the {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (1573–1593) | MainBuilding = | Alternatename = | AnnualFestival = | Ceremonies = | location = {{ill|Kaiyo|WD=Q1205954|1=Kaiyō, Tokushima}} }} '''Todoroki Shrine''' (轟神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|Kaiyō, Tokushima|en|Kaiyō, Tokushima|WD=Q1205954|lt=Kaiyō|1=Kaiyō, Tokushima}}, {{ill|Tokushima Prefecture|en|Tokushima Prefecture|WD=Q160734|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}, Japan. == History == Todoroki Shrine was established during the {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|WD=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (1573–1593). The surrounding {{ill|Todoroki 99 Falls|ja|轟九十九滝|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Todoroki 99 Falls|1=Todoroki 99 Waterfalls|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11637784}} have been revered as a sacred site where divine spirits dwell. According to tradition, {{ill|Hachisuka Iemasa|en|Hachisuka Iemasa|WD=Q1073557|lt=Hachisuka Iemasa|1=Hachisuka Iemasa}}, the founder of the {{ill|Tokushima Domain|en|Tokushima Domain|WD=Q3034557|lt=Tokushima Domain|1=Tokushima Domain}}, prayed at the shrine for safe sea voyages during the {{ill|Imjin War|en|Imjin War|WD=Q576338|lt=Bunroku and Keichō Campaigns|1=Imjin War}}{{Cite web|url=https://www.awanavi.jp/spot/20495.html |title=Todoroki Shrine |publisher=Awa Navi |accessdate=2021-04-23}}. Each autumn, a grand festival is held at Todoroki Shrine and Todoroki 99 Falls. During the festival, men dressed in white robes carry a portable shrine ({{ill|Mikoshi|en|Mikoshi|WD=Q979940|lt=Mikoshi|1=Mikoshi}}) and rush down 140 steep stone steps from Todoroki Shrine, creating a dramatic and sacred spectacle{{Cite web|url=https://www.kaiyo-kankou.jp/index.php/event2/todorokifes-aki |title=Todoroki Autumn Festival |publisher=Kaiyō Tourism Association |accessdate=2021-04-23 |archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20130423021314/http://www.kaiyo-kankou.jp:80/index.php/event2/todorokifes-aki |archive-date=2013-04-23}}. == Enshrined Deities == * {{ill|Mizuhanome|en|Mizuhanome|WD=Q8191796|lt=Mizuhanome|1=Mizuhanome}} (Goddess of Water) * {{ill|Kunisatsuchi|ja|国狭槌尊|1=Kunisatsuchi-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunisatsuchi|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunisatsuchi-no-Mikoto|qq=}} (deity of the Land) * {{ill|Ōyamatsumi|ja|大山祇命|1=Ōyamatsumi|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōyamatsumi|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to オオヤマツミ}} (Mountain God) == Transportation == * Take the {{ill|Shikoku Railway Company|en|Shikoku Railway Company|WD=Q496531|lt=JR Shikoku|1=Shikoku Railway Company}} {{ill|Mugi Line|en|Mugi Line|WD=Q860478|lt=Mugi Line|1=Mugi Line}} to {{ill|Awa-Kainan Station|en|Awa-Kainan Station|WD=Q4829614|lt=Awa-Kainan Station|1=Awa-Kainan Station}}, then transfer to a town bus to the "Todoroki Shrine" stop. The shrine is a 10-minute walk from the stop. == References == == External Links == * [https://www.awanavi.jp/spot/20495.html Todoroki Shrine] - Awa Navi {{shinto-stub}} {{translated page|ja|轟神社 (海陽町)|version=99755166|comment=Imported full ja history}} {{wikidata link|Q106852497|ja|轟神社 (海陽町)}} [[Category:Buildings and structures in Kaiyo Town]] [[Category:Image requests in Kaifu District, Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Municipal History of Kaiyo]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
